results.text: Cameron Aucoin - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. A master of the small plays, Aucoin consistently keeps rushes to the outside with steady footwork, middle-protecting routes, and well-timed pokes after opponents enter his space. Cameron Aucoin (b.2007) Hockey Stats and Profile at hockeydb.com. Statistics of Cameron Aucoin, a hockey player from Hinsdale, IL born Mar 20 2007 who was active from 2023 to 2026.
